G1.name: Governance
G1.text: policy, role, provenance, and ticket controls are non-negotiable

G2.name: Quality
G2.text: maximize correctness and engineering value of outcomes

G3.name: Zero Cost
G3.text: prefer local/fleet/free lanes before paid providers

G4.name: Privacy
G4.text: keep sensitive context local unless explicit override exists

G5.name: Portability
G5.text: avoid user-specific coupling; settings-driven behavior preferred

G6.name: Resilience
G6.text: graceful degradation and fallback paths for partial outages

G7.name: Throughput
G7.text: acceptable speed after higher-priority goals are satisfied

G8.name: Observability
G8.text: decisions and outcomes are visible, auditable, and attributable

G9.name: Interoperability
G9.text: preserve compatibility across agent surfaces and runtimes
